calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Angie Diner.
Atty. Howard Smukler Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff Xythos Software Inc.
Witness for the Plaintiff Edward Miller was sworn and examined.
Second Amended Complaint filed on February 7, 2006 correcting defendant's name to Shirley Moulton.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants Universal Solutions Inc and Shirley Moulton as follows:
Principal $ 165,920.00
Prejudgment Interest $ 32,958.50
Attorney's Fees $ 0
Costs $ 748.00 TOTAL JUDGMENT= $199,626.50
Judgment signed in open court.
